节点.功能描述: Provides methods to operate or manage Wi-Fi.
Enables Wi-Fi.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the operation is successful, returns {@code false} otherwise.

注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the operation is successful, returns {@code false} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.

注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the Wi-Fi is active, returns {@code false} otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the Wi-Fi is active, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Scans Wi-Fi hotspot.

This API works in asynchronous mode.

节点.功能描述:
Adds Wi-Fi connection configuration to the device.

The configuration will be updated when the configuration is added.
注释信息: @param { WifiDeviceConfig } config Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.
@returns { Promise<number> } Returns {@code networkId} if the configuration is added; returns {@code -1} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.

parameters.说明: Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code networkId} if the configuration is added; returns {@code -1} otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Adds Wi-Fi connection configuration to the device.

The configuration will be updated when the configuration is added.
注释信息: @param { WifiDeviceConfig } config Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.

parameters.说明: Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.

节点.功能描述:
Adds a specified untrusted hotspot configuration.

This method adds one configuration at a time. After this configuration is added, your device will determine whether to connect to the hotspot.
注释信息: @param { WifiDeviceConfig } config - Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.
@returns { Promise<boolean> }  Returns {@code true} if the untrusted hotspot configuration is added, returns {@code false} otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the untrusted hotspot configuration is added, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Adds a specified untrusted hotspot configuration.

This method adds one configuration at a time. After this configuration is added, your device will determine whether to connect to the hotspot.
注释信息: @param { WifiDeviceConfig } config - Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.

parameters.说明: Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.

节点.功能描述:
Removes a specified untrusted hotspot configuration.

This method removes one configuration at a time.
注释信息: @param { WifiDeviceConfig } config - Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.
@returns { Promise<boolean> } Returns {@code true} if the untrusted hotspot configuration is removed, returns {@code false} otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the untrusted hotspot configuration is removed, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述:

This method removes one configuration at a time.
注释信息: @param { WifiDeviceConfig } config - Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.

parameters.说明: Indicates the device configuration for connection to the Wi-Fi network.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the network connection is successful, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Calculates the Wi-Fi signal level based on the Wi-Fi RSSI and frequency band.
注释信息: @param { number } rssi Indicates the Wi-Fi RSSI.
@param { number } band Indicates the Wi-Fi frequency band.
@returns { number } Returns Wi-Fi signal level ranging from 0 to 4.
节点.return_description: Returns Wi-Fi signal level ranging from 0 to 4.

节点.功能描述: Obtains information about a Wi-Fi connection.
节点.return_description: Returns Wi-Fi linked information.

Checks whether a Wi-Fi connection has been set up.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the features supported by this device.

To check whether this device supports a specified feature.
注释信息: @returns { number }Returns the features supported by this device.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns the features supported by this device.

parameters.说明: Indicates the ID of the feature.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the MAC address of a Wi-Fi device. Wi-Fi must be enabled.

The MAC address is unique and cannot be changed.
注释信息: @returns { string[] } Returns the MAC address of the Wi-Fi device.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns the MAC address of the Wi-Fi device.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the IP information of a Wi-Fi connection.

The IP information includes the host IP address, gateway address, and DNS information.
注释信息: @returns { IpInfo } Returns the IP information of the Wi-Fi connection.
节点.return_description: Returns the IP information of the Wi-Fi connection.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the country code of this device.
注释信息: @returns { string } Returns the country code of this device.
节点.return_description: Returns the country code of this device.

节点.return_description: {@code true} if the Wi-Fi network is re-connect successfully.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the list of all existing Wi-Fi configurations.

You can obtain only the Wi-Fi configurations you created on your own application.
注释信息: @returns { Array<WifiDeviceConfig> } sReturns the list of all existing Wi-Fi configurations you created on your application.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: sReturns the list of all existing Wi-Fi configurations you created on your application.

节点.功能描述: Updates the specified Wi-Fi configuration. returns {@code -1} if the specified Wi-Fi configuration is not contained in the list.
注释信息: @param { WifiDeviceConfig } config Indicates the Wi-Fi configuration to update.
@returns { number } Returns the network ID in the updated Wi-Fi configuration if the update is successful;
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.

parameters.说明: Indicates the Wi-Fi configuration to update.

节点.return_description: Returns the network ID in the updated Wi-Fi configuration if the update is successful;

节点.功能描述:
Disables a specified network.

The disabled network will not be associated with again.
注释信息: @param { number } netId Identifies the network to disable.
@returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the specified network is disabled, returns {@code false} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the specified network is disabled, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Removes all the saved Wi-Fi configurations. returns {@code false} otherwise.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if all the saved Wi-Fi configurations are removed;
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if all the saved Wi-Fi configurations are removed;

节点.功能描述:
Deletes a Wi-Fi network with a specified ID.

After a Wi-Fi network is deleted, its configuration will be deleted from the list of Wi-Fi configurations. If the Wi-Fi network is being connected, the connection will be interrupted. The application can only delete Wi-Fi networks it has created. which can be obtained using the {@link #addDeviceConfig} or {@link #getLinkedInfo} method.
注释信息: @param { number } id Indicates the ID of the Wi-Fi network,
@returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the Wi-Fi network is deleted successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.

parameters.说明: Indicates the ID of the Wi-Fi network,

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the Wi-Fi network is deleted successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Enables a Wi-Fi hotspot.

This method is asynchronous. After the Wi-Fi hotspot is enabled, Wi-Fi may be disabled.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if this method is called successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if this method is called successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Disables a Wi-Fi hotspot.

This method is asynchronous. If Wi-Fi is enabled after the Wi-Fi hotspot is disabled, Wi-Fi may be re-enabled.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if this method is called successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if this method is called successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether a device serving as a Wi-Fi hotspot supports both the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz Wi-Fi.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the method is called successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the method is called successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether Wi-Fi hotspot is active on a device.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if Wi-Fi hotspot is enabled, returns {@code false} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if Wi-Fi hotspot is enabled, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the hotspot for a device.

Only OPEN and WPA2 PSK hotspot can be configured. The SSID and {@code securityType} must be available and correct. If {@code securityType} is not {@code open}, {@code preSharedKey} must be available and correct.
注释信息: @param { HotspotConfig } Indicates the Wi-Fi hotspot configuration.
@returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the method is called successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the method is called successfully, returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the Wi-Fi hotspot configuration.
注释信息: @returns { HotspotConfig } Returns the configuration of an existing or enabled Wi-Fi hotspot.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns the configuration of an existing or enabled Wi-Fi hotspot.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the list of clients that are connected to a Wi-Fi hotspot.

This method can only be used on a device that serves as a Wi-Fi hotspot.

@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.
节点.return_description: Returns the list of clients that are connected to the Wi-Fi hotspot.

节点.功能描述: Wi-Fi device configuration information.
Wi-Fi SSID: the maximum length is 32
Wi-Fi bssid(MAC): the length is 6
Wi-Fi key: maximum length is 64
Hide SSID or not, false(default): not hide
Security type: reference definition of WifiSecurityType
The UID of the Wi-Fi configuration creator
